item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Chicken in a creamy peanut sauce with vegetables, served with rice and toppedwith toasted coconut flakes and spring onions. Fresh Ajaad salad on the side (4+6+7+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: North African lamb cassoulet with white beans, vegetables and dried fruits,slow simmered with warm spices, served with roasted potatoes and topped withfresh mint and parsley. Mustard on the side (11+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish North African broccoli cassoulet with white beans, vegetables and dried fruits,rich in warm spices, served with roasted potatoes and topped with mint andparsley. Mustard on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Tandoori chicken with vegetables in creamy coconut milk, rich in warm spices,served with rice and fresh raita (6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Tandoori cauliflower with vegetables and lentils in coconut milk, warm andaromatic, served with rice and raita

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Meatballs in a mild and creamy curry sauce, warm and comforting, served withrice (1+2+6+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Vegetable balls and chickpeas in a mild curry sauce, rich in flavour andwarmth, served with rice (13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: BBQ marinated pork neck, slow roasted to a juicy centre and caramelised finish,served with creamy potatoes and topped with parsley. Fresh apple slaw withlemon vinaigrette (6+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: BBQ marinated whole roasted cauliflower with deep flavour, served with creamypotatoes and parsley. Apple and bean slaw with lemon vinaigrette
